    YES - Static variable in class org.tquadrat.foundation.config.cli.YesNoValueHandler.YesNoStringConverter
    The various forms of 'yes'.
    YesNoStringConverter() - Constructor for class org.tquadrat.foundation.config.cli.YesNoValueHandler.YesNoStringConverter
    Creates a new instance of YesNoValueStringConverter.
    YesNoValueHandler - Class in org.tquadrat.foundation.config.cli
    An implementation of CmdLineValueHandler for boolean and Boolean values that does accept also "yes", "qui", "ja", "sí", "sì", "да", "sim", "tak" and more as true.
    YesNoValueHandler(BiConsumer) - Constructor for class org.tquadrat.foundation.config.cli.YesNoValueHandler
    Creates a new YesNoValueHandler instance.
    YesNoValueHandler(CLIDefinition, BiConsumer) - Constructor for class org.tquadrat.foundation.config.cli.YesNoValueHandler
    Creates a new YesNoValueHandler instance.
    YesNoValueHandler.YesNoStringConverter - Class in org.tquadrat.foundation.config.cli
    An implementation of StringConverter that translates 'yes' in various languages into true.
